note: GDP per capita is expressed in [international-$](#dod:int_dollar_abbreviation) at 2021 prices.
title: Using improved drinking water sources vs. GDP per capita
subtitle: An [improved drinking water source](#dod:improved-water-source) is a safely designed source, which includes piped water, protected wells and springs and other sources. [GDP per capita](#dod:gdp) is adjusted for inflation and differences in living costs between countries.
